notes: Agent self-reports task progress via an in-band hidden marker (irrlicht-eta) driven by the FENCED instruction-file rule (bare HTML comments are stripped from CLAUDE.md at injection — fencing is mandatory, verified live on claude v2.1.161 + sonnet, 0/7→7/7 burndown). The claudecode parser scans full assistant text blocks (taskestimate.go), surfaces TaskEstimate {total_rounds, completed_rounds, updated_at} on SessionMetrics, and ForecastTaskCompletion projects task_completion_eta at the measured rate (elapsed/completed). The PHASE DSL asserts only the user-observable lifecycle arc — a multi-turn ready→working→ready walk to a ready finish; the estimate-content invariants (completed_rounds present + non-decreasing + reaching total_rounds; updated_at advancing; ETA present once ≥1 round reported and burning down; fields present only while working / absent at ready) live in the scenario acceptance_criteria + the recipe verify[], mirroring how token-accounting's monotonic-token invariant lives outside the phase form. Emission is model-discretion (soft): sonnet emits reliably on a multi-step task, opus 4.8 skipped on a short one — record settles it. observations.model pinned to sonnet; record corrects on drift.

text: Session appears in ready (first phase anchored UNPINNED to start so a transient proc-<PID> presession can't steal birth)
First prompt (plan 5 phases, emit 0/5 then advance to 1/5) drives ready → working; the first marker is emitted and task_estimate.total_rounds=5 appears on metrics
Turn 1 completes back to ready; completed_rounds=1 (the first reported round) — task_completion_eta now projectable
Phase-2 prompt drives ready → working; marker advances toward 2/5 (completed_rounds non-decreasing, updated_at advances)
Turn 2 completes back to ready; ETA after this marker ≤ ETA after turn 1 (burns down)
Phase-3 prompt drives ready → working; marker advances toward 3/5
Phase-4 prompt drives ready → working; marker advances toward 4/5
Final phase-5 prompt drives ready → working; marker reaches 5/5 (completed_rounds == total_rounds by the final working turn)
Final turn completes working → ready; final session state is ready; the ≥12s trailing idle captures the post-turn settle, after which the client suppresses the ETA chip (present only while working)
